name: sam-gov-mcp
description: MCP server for SAM.gov entity registration, exclusions, opportunities, and contract awards (FPDS replacement)
long_description:
Queries SAM.gov REST APIs for federal entity and contract data, including:

- **Entity Management v3** (UEI/CAGE lookups, registration status, business types, NAICS/PSC, reps and certs)
- **Exclusions v4** (debarment, suspension, responsibility determinations)
- **Opportunities v2** (solicitations, sources sought, award notices)
- **Contract Awards v1** (FPDS replacement; PIID lookups, mod histories, vendor award searches)
- **PSC code lookups**

15 read-only tools. Built for GS-1102 contracting officers, contract specialists, and anyone performing pre-award or responsibility determinations.

Independently hardened across 7 audit rounds with 816 regression tests (54.4 tests per tool). Round 6 was a live audit (1 P1 fixed: entity_name parameter rejected by the API). Round 7 was a Hypothesis-driven property-test punishment suite that surfaced 2 P3 edge cases (_safe_int crashed on inf/nan floats; _normalize_awards_response returned empty dict on empty CDN responses; both fixed). 49 bugs fixed during hardening. Origin repo for the `extra='forbid'` pydantic pattern that protects every 1102tools MCP from typo'd parameter name silent-wrong-data bugs.

Full testing record in the source repository.

sam_api_key.title: SAM.gov API Key
sam_api_key.description: Free API key from https://sam.gov (sign in, go to Account Details, request a key). Rotates every 90 days; regenerate at sam.gov and update here when it expires.
